data.name: Maintenance Job No Subscribers
data.value: No one is subscribed to updates for this job

data.name: Maintenance Job One Subscriber
data.value: 1 person is subscribed to updates for this job

data.name: Maintenance Job Multiple Subscribers
data.value: {0} people are subscribed to updates for this job

data.name: Access Denied Text
data.value: Looks like you don't have access to this page. Contact your system administrator to request access

data.name: Error Text
data.value: There was an error dealing with your request. If this continues to happen, get in touch with your system administrator

data.name: No Roles Text
data.value: You don't have any roles assigned to you

data.name: Roles List Text
data.value: These are the roles that have been assigned to you by your system administrator. They control what you can and can't do in the app.

data.name: Account Details Text
data.value: Your account details and password are managed by your identity provider.

data.name: Create New Job Text
data.value: Add a job to the maintenance database by adding it to the map and filling in the relevant details.

data.name: Search Validation Date Not In Future Message
data.value: '{0}' must not be in the future

data.name: Search Validation At Least One Message
data.value: At least one search field should be filled in

data.name: Route Does Not Exist Validation Message
data.value: Route '{0}' does not exist in the database

data.name: No Rights of Way Near Geometry Validation Message
data.value: There are no routes near where you clicked.

data.name: No Rights of Way Near Geometry Options Text
data.value: You can either redraw your point nearer to a route, or fill in the Route ID manually.

data.name: Invalid Geometry Validation Message
data.value: Your geometry is not valid. Redraw your geometry, and if you still have issues, contact your system administrator

data.name: Maintenance Job Not Found Error Message
data.value: Maintenance job with ID '{0}' was not found in the database

data.name: Concurrency Error Message
data.value: Could not update {0}. The data has been modified by another user. Please reload the page.

data.name: Delete Comment Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?

data.name: Public Comment Warning Text
data.value: This comment will be visible to members of the public and (if new) will be emailed to subscribers. Make sure personal details are removed and the comment is appropriately written.

data.name: No Maintenance Comments Message
data.value: No comments for this maintenance item.

data.name: At Least One Contact Property Validation Message
data.value: You need to fill in at least one contact detail

data.name: Save Error Message
data.value: There was a problem saving this data. Try again or contact your system administrator.

data.name: Too Many Files Upload Error
data.value: You can only upload a maximum of {0} files at once

data.name: File Too Large Upload Error
data.value: Max file size of {0}MB exceeded for file '{1}'

data.name: Upload Explanatory Text
data.value: Click or drag and drop files into the box below to upload. You can add up to {0} files at once, maximum {1}MB per file. If you are on a mobile device you can take a photo or video directly from the button below.

data.name: General Error Message
data.value: An error occurred that we weren't expecting. Reload the page to try again.

data.name: General Component Error Message
data.value: There was an error showing this data that we weren't expecting. Reload the page to try again, or contact your system administrator if the problem persists.

data.name: All Nearby Infrastructure Linked Message
data.value: All nearby infrastructure has already been linked to this maintenance job

data.name: No Infrastructure Nearby Message
data.value: No infrastructure could be found nearby

data.name: Delete Infra Link Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to unlink this infrastructure from the maintenance job?

data.name: Infrastructure Does Not Exist Validation Message
data.value: No infrastructure with that ID could be found

data.name: No Maintenance Contacts Message
data.value: No contacts for this maintenance job

data.name: No Job Infra Message
data.value: No infrastructure is linked to this job

data.name: 404 Error Text
data.value: We couldn't find the page you were looking for. Check your link and try again, or get in touch with the system administrators.

data.name: No Files Uploaded Error
data.value: None of your files were uploaded

data.name: Partial File Upload Error
data.value: Some of your files were not uploaded

data.name: Geometry Outside UK Validation Message
data.value: The location you chose is outside of the UK

data.name: Delete Contact Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this contact?

data.name: Delete Media Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this file?

data.name: Create New Infrastructure Text
data.value: Add an infrastructure item to the database by adding it to the map and filling in the relevant details.

data.name: Infrastructure Not Found Error Message
data.value: Infrastructure with ID '{0}' was not found in the database

data.name: Create New Right of Way Text
data.value: Create a new Right of Way by drawing the line on a map and adding the details.

data.name: Create New Right of Way Label
Search Rights of Way Title
data.value: Search for a Right of Way

data.name: Right of Way Not Found Error Message
data.value: No Rights of Way with ID '{0}' could be found

data.name: Closure End Date Passed Short Warning Text
Closure End Date Passed Warning Text
data.value: This path was supposed to reopen {0}. Reopen the path or update the reopening date

data.name: Route Code Not Unique Validation Message
Multiple Parish Codes Found Error Message
data.value: This route goes across multiple parishes. We've set the route code based on which parish the route is most within, which is '{0}'. You may want to check this is what you want.

data.name: No Parish Found Error Message
data.value: No parishes could be found that contain this route

data.name: Invalid Closure Dates Validation Message
data.value: Closure end date must be after start date

data.name: Multi Select Instructions Text
data.value: Select multiple entries by holding down Ctrl on your keyboard

data.name: No Route Infra Message
data.value: No infrastructure has been recorded on this route

data.name: No Statements Message
data.value: No statements found for this Right of Way

data.name: Search Results Limit Text
data.value: The maximum number of results ({0}) are shown. To see all results of a search please narrow your search criteria.

data.name: Create New DMMO Text
data.value: Add a new DMMO application to the database by drawing it on the map and filling in the relevant details.

data.name: DMMO Not Found Error Message
data.value: DMMO with reference number '{0}' not found

data.name: Automatic Parishes Information Message
data.value: These parishes are automatically derived from the geometry

data.name: No Parishes Found Message
data.value: No parishes linked to this item

data.name: Max Allowed Files For Type Warning Message
data.value: You've added the max number of files ({0}) to this category. If you want to replace a file, delete it first.

data.name: Delete DMMO Address Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this address from the DMMO?

data.name: Add Addresses From Map Help Text
data.value: Draw an area on the map then choose which addresses to add

data.name: Add All Addresses And Go Back Label
data.value: Add all addresses and go back to details page

data.name: Add All Addresses And Continue Label
data.value: Add all addresses and search for another location

data.name: Add Individual Addresses Label
data.value: Or add individual addresses by selecting them below

data.name: Address Search Help Text
data.value: Enter a postcode, UPRN or house/street name

data.name: Add Linked Routes From Map Label
Add Linked Routes From Map Help Text
data.value: Link a route by selecting it on the map. Unlink a route by clicking the highlighted route on the map.

data.name: No Routes Nearby Message
data.value: No routes could be found nearby

data.name: Linked Route Already Exists Validation Message
data.value: That route has already been linked

data.name: Delete DMMO Linked Route Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this linked route?

data.name: No Routes Found At Click Error Message
data.value: No routes found where you clicked. Try zooming closer if you are having trouble.

data.name: Create New Landowner Deposit Text
data.value: Create a new Landowner Deposit using a map

data.name: Landowner Deposit Cheque Paid In Label
Landowner Deposit Website Notice Published Label
Landowner Deposit Website Entry Printed Label
Landowner Deposit Not Found Error Message
data.value: Landowner Deposit with ID '{0}' was not found in the database

data.name: Delete Landowner Deposit Address Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this address from the Landowner Deposit?

data.name: Signed Out Text
data.value: You can now close your browser window

data.name: Management Text
data.value: Manage users for {0} and view the audit logs

data.name: User Edit Text
data.value: User details are managed through the external identity provider

data.name: User Roles Text
data.value: Add or remove this users roles. Roles can give users powerful abilities. Use with caution.

data.name: Available Users Text
data.value: These users do not currently have access to {0}. You can give them access by selecting them and giving them a role.

data.name: New Bridge Survey Text
data.value: Find a bridge and start a new survey

data.name: Existing Bridge Surveys Text
data.value: View and update existing bridge surveys

data.name: Start New Bridge Survey Text
data.value:
You will need to:
  • tell us the construction and condition of all parts of the bridge
  • submit at least one photo of the bridge
  • tell us about any repairs required

data.name: Start New Bridge Survey Disclaimer
data.value:
Remember to stay safe and always stick to the legal paths.

You'll need an internet connection. If you are in an area of bad coverage, you may need to complete the survey at home.

If you have any issues, contact your local ranger.

data.name: New Bridge Survey Help Text
data.value: Find the bridge you are surveying using the infrastructure ID, or your location

data.name: Bridge Survey Confirm Location Current Accuracy Label
Bridge Survey Confirm Location Question
data.value: Are you at the bridge now?

data.name: Bridge Survey Confirm Location Question Text
data.value: Don't worry if you're not, we just want to improve the accuracy of our map

data.name: Bridge Survey Confirm Location At Location Title
Bridge Survey Confirm Location At Location Text
data.value:
Great! Make sure your devices location is turned on, stand in the middle of the bridge (if safe) and hit the 'Locate me' button below.

To get the best result we can, we will spend up to 30 seconds getting your position, so please be patient.

data.name: Bridge Survey Confirm Location Not At Location Title
Bridge Survey Confirm Location Not At Location Text
data.value: Not to worry, carry on by hitting Continue below.

data.name: Location Error Message
data.value: We couldn't get your location accurately enough. You can try again or continue with the form.

data.name: Bridge Survey Location Confirmed Text
data.value: You've already confirmed the location of the bridge to an accuracy of {0} metres. This means you can skip this section. If you want to re-do the location, carry on below.

data.name: Bridge Survey Construction Question
data.value: What materials is the bridge made of?

data.name: Bridge Survey Beam Material Label
data.value: What are the beams made of?

data.name: Bridge Survey Num Beam Timbers Label
Bridge Survey Size Beam Timbers Label
data.value: What size are the beams timbers?

data.name: Bridge Survey Decking Material Label
data.value: What is the decking made of?

data.name: Bridge Survey Num Decking Boards Label
data.value: How many decking boards are there?

data.name: Bridge Survey Size Decking Boards Label
data.value: What size are the decking boards?

data.name: Bridge Survey Length Decking Boards Label
data.value: What length are the decking boards?

data.name: Bridge Survey Handrail Material Label
data.value: What is the handrail made of?

data.name: Bridge Survey Size Handrail Timbers Label
data.value: What size are the handrail timbers?

data.name: Bridge Survey Handrails In Place Label
data.value: Are the handrails and intermediate rails all still in place, including kickboard?

data.name: Bridge Survey Handrail Posts Material Label
data.value: What are the handrail posts made of?

data.name: Bridge Survey Num Handrail Posts Label
data.value: How many posts are there in total?

data.name: Bridge Survey Size Handrail Posts Label
Bridge Survey Bank Seat Material Label
data.value: What is the bank seat made of?

data.name: Bridge Survey Anti Slip Installed Label
Bridge Survey Ramp Installed Label
data.value: Is there a ramp at either end?

data.name: Bridge Survey Steps Installed Label
data.value: Are there any steps at either end?

data.name: Bridge Survey Height Label
data.value: What is the height of the bridge in metres?

data.name: Bridge Survey Length Label
data.value: What is the length of the bridge in metres?

data.name: Bridge Survey Handrails In Place Hint Text
data.value: 4 each side for a footpath bridge, 5 each side for a bridleway bridge

data.name: Bridge Survey Handrails In Place Additional Text
data.value: If 'No' please make sure you tell us what's missing in the Repairs Required section later on in the form.

data.name: Bridge Survey Condition Question
data.value: What condition is the bridge in?

data.name: Bridge Survey Beam Condition Label
data.value: What condition is the beam in?

data.name: Bridge Survey Decking Condition Label
data.value: What condition is the decking in?

data.name: Bridge Survey Handrail Condition Label
data.value: What condition is the handrail in?

data.name: Bridge Survey Handrail Posts Condition Label
data.value: What condition are the handrail posts in?

data.name: Bridge Survey Bank Seat Condition Label
data.value: What condition is the bank seat in?

data.name: Bridge Survey Signs Of Bank Erosion Label
data.value: Are there any signs of erosion on the bank?

data.name: Bridge Survey High Usage Label
data.value: Is this a high usage bridge?

data.name: Bridge Survey Cover Boards In Place Label
data.value: Are both cover boards still in place?

data.name: Bridge Survey Media Help Text
data.value:
Upload some photos or videos of the bridge to help us validate your survey and check what works might be required.

Please try to add at least one photo. If you are unable to at the moment, you can save the survey and come back later.

Media uploaded may be made public.

data.name: Bridge Survey Media Added Message
data.value: You've already uploaded some media to this survey. You can add more photos or videos here, or you can skip this section.

data.name: Bridge Survey Media Unable To Add Help Text
data.value: If you are unable to add any media, just hit 'Continue without media'

data.name: Bridge Survey Continue Without Media Button Text
Bridge Survey Confirm Location Summary Title
Bridge Survey Handrail Posts Short Label
Bridge Survey Bank Seat Short Label
Bridge Survey Anti Slip Short Label
Bridge Survey Signs Of Bank Erosion Short Label
Bridge Survey Seriously Eroded Short Label
Bridge Survey High Usage Short Label
Bridge Survey Cover Boards In Place Short Label
Bridge Survey Repairs Required Short Label
Bridge Survey Media Provided Summary Label
Bridge Survey Summary Submit Help Text
data.value: Your survey will be checked by our rangers who may contact you for further information.

data.name: Bridge Survey What Happens Next Text
data.value:
What happens next

We've sent your survey to your local ranger.

They will check your survey and arrange for any repairs. They may contact you if they need further information about the bridge.

data.name: Survey Validated Message
data.value: This survey has been validated and added to the infrastructure item

data.name: Bridge Handrails In Place Short Label
Bridge Survey No Updated Location Message
data.value: The surveyor did not provide an updated location

data.name: Bridge Survey Update Details Label
data.value: Update bridge details with survey information?

data.name: Bridge Survey Update Details Help Text
data.value: Bridge details will be updated with what was reported above. Check the fields carefully before allowing this. If there are problems, you can either accept their changes and manually edit them afterwards, or uncheck the above box to ignore all their changes.

data.name: Bridge Survey Update Location Label
data.value: Update bridge location with survey location?

data.name: Bridge Survey Update Location Help Text
data.value: Bridge location will be moved to the user submitted location shown above. Check this carefully before doing so. If its not accurate enough, uncheck the box above and move it manually through the infrastructure edit pages.

data.name: Bridge Survey Add Media To Bridge Label
data.value: Add submitted media to bridge details?

data.name: Bridge Survey Add Media To Bridge Help Text
data.value: All media attached to this survey will be publically viewable. Don't do this if there are identifiable people or the photos/videos are of poor quality. To attach individual items, download them and attach to the infrastructure item manually.

data.name: Bridge Survey Create Maint Job Label
No Bridge Details Text
data.value: No detailed information about the bridge has been recorded

data.name: No Surveys Awaiting Validation Message
data.value: All done! No surveys for you to validate right now

data.name: No Surveys For Infrastructure Text
data.value: No surveys have been completed on this infrastructure item

data.name: Find Bridge By Location Title
data.value: Find bridge using your device location

data.name: Find Bridge By Location Text
data.value: If you are at the bridge now, we can look up the bridge for you using your location. Stand near the bridge whilst we check.

data.name: Bridges Found Text
data.value: We found {0} bridges near your location

data.name: Survey Not A Bridge Error Message
data.value: The infrastructure you selected was not a bridge

data.name: Bridge Survey Create Maint Job Help Text
data.value: A maintenance job will be created at the bridge location with the details from the 'Repairs required' field.

data.name: No Contacts Message
data.value: No contacts found for this item

data.name: Direction Of Secretary Of State Label
DMMO Order Not Found Error Message
Decision Of Secretary Of State Label
Date Direction Of Secretary Of State Label
data.value: Date of direction of Secretary of State

data.name: Create New PPO Text
data.value: Add a new PPO application to the database by drawing it on the map and filling in the relevant details.

data.name: PPO Not Found Error Message
data.value: PPO with reference number '{0}' was not found

data.name: Delete Order Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this order?

data.name: No Affected Addresses Message
data.value: No affected addresses have been added

data.name: No Landowner Deposit Events Message
data.value: No events for this Landowner Deposit.

data.name: Recent Maintenance Jobs Card Title
data.value: New maintenance jobs in your area

data.name: Maintenance Jobs Card Error Message
data.value: There was a problem loading this data. Try again or contact your system administrator.

data.name: Delete Event Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this event?

data.name: Landowner Deposit Create Linked Deposit Title
No Linked Deposits Found Message
data.value: No Landowner Deposits linked to this deposit

data.name: No Recent Work Message
data.value: Nothing viewed recently. Start exploring and what you view will appear here

data.name: My Work Card Error Message
data.value: An error occurred fetching this data. Refresh the page to try again.

data.name: No Nearby Bridges Message
data.value: No bridges could be found within {0}m of your location

data.name: Recent Maintenance Jobs Card Title for All Teams
Redacted Problem Description Help Text Short
data.value: This field has been automatically redacted for the public due to PII or harmful content

data.name: Redacted Problem Description Help Text Long
data.value:
Please review the redacted version and decide how to proceed:
  • If the redaction is partial, you may:
    • Keep it as-is, or
    • Remove the redacted version and update the Problem Description field with a suitable revision.
  • If the redaction is complete, you should:
    • Replace the Problem Description field with a more appropriate summary, and
    • Remove the redacted version.

data.name: Delete Redaction Confirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this redaction. The original Problem Details field will become visible to the public. Make sure it is appropriate.

data.name: Rights of Way Closures Card Title
data.value: Rights of Way due for reopening

data.name: Rights Of Way Closure Card Error Message
data.value: There was a problem loading this data. Try again or contact your system administrator.

data.name: No Closed Routes Message
data.value: There are no Rights of Way due to be opening soon
